title: Watch this 100x developer use Codex… it’s insane
summary: David Ondrej features Pietro Schirano demonstrating code generation using Codex, emphasizing dramatic productivity gains. The video promotes AI-assisted coding education and references MagicPath, a tool associated with the demonstrated workflow.
